# RestrictedSandboxRevision.revision1

**Case**

Revision 1 of the restricted sandbox rules.

## Declaration

```swift
case revision1
```

## Overview

This revision applies restrictions to the web content extension, but not to the networking or rendering extensions. For more information, see [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/limiting-resource-access-in-content-extensions].
title: RestrictedSandboxRevision.revision1
